name: Nomad
description: Project N.O.M.A.D. is a self-contained, offline-first knowledge and education server with AI chat, Wikipedia, Khan Academy courses, maps, and more. No internet required after setup.

notes.text: N.O.M.A.D. has no built-in authentication. Use network-level controls to manage access. Do not expose directly to the internet.
The AI Assistant is optional. If you don't need AI, skip it in the setup wizard and everything else still works.
Data is persisted in bind mounts on the host (default: /opt/nomad/{mysql,storage,redis}). Set NOMAD_DATA_DIR env var before install to customize, e.g. NOMAD_DATA_DIR=/mnt/storage.
GPU passthrough is enabled by default. Currently only NVIDIA GPUs are supported for AI acceleration.
Recommended specs for AI features: AMD Ryzen 7 or Intel Core i7 or better, 32 GB RAM, NVIDIA RTX 3060 or better, at least 250 GB free disk space (preferably on SSD).
